title: 43rd Flying Modpack Reborn
description: The Modrinth version of the Curseforge pack.  And I trimmed the fat.
body:
A refreshed version of the modpack I created for 1.20, but this time on Modrinth and using Fabric, instead of Forge.

As it stands right now, there should be no need for a server and a client version each release, which should make running the pack on a server much easier to manage.  Testing still needs to be done to verify, though.

The main mods of focus here are Cobblemon and Botania (once its 1.21.1 release is live).  Other than those two, the modpack includes mods that are mostly Vanilla+.

If you are familiar with the original modpack on Curseforge (somehow) I trimmed the fat from that one, made the necessary substitutions for some mods that have no fabric version, and added mods with a greater focus on immersion.  Distant Horizons, Biomes O' Plenty, and Terralith stand out as new additions which really make the world pop more with the revamp.

I will work on creating an updated spreadsheet for this 1.21.1 Fabric version of the mod pack.  But for now, please enjoy the initial, almost feature complete, modpack.

----------

LootBeams 3.0.0+ is strangely incompatible with Iris Shaders, so LootBeams will remain at version 2.9.1 until that incompatibility is resolved by LootBeams.

If there is a version 0.4.0 of this modpack, it will be thanks to that incompatibility being resolved.  Otherwise, the next release will be 1.0 when Botania 1.21.1 releases.
